summary: Publishes buy/sell signals matching a managed portfolio for consumers to subscribe to and act on.

tools.name: signals.feed
tools.description: Subscribe to the live buy/sell signal feed matching the published portfolio; each signal carries ticker, side, conviction and rationale. Subscription-gated and priced.

tools.name: signals.history
tools.description: Return recently published signals with their realized or simulated outcomes for transparency and backtesting.

tools.name: portfolio.positions
tools.description: Show the current published portfolio positions, sizes and entry context that the signals are derived from.
